title: Krisada-isms
description: The terms, phrases, and frameworks I use that do not map cleanly to standard SEO or marketing vocabulary ... things I have named because nothing else fit.

seo.title: Krisada-isms Glossary | Krisada.com
seo.description: Krisada's own terms and frameworks ... defined in his own words because standard SEO vocabulary did not cover them.
